main_post.text:
🔍 New Release: Android Termux SSH Bootstrap v1.0.0

A new Codex skill for bootstrapping Termux-over-SSH from Windows PC via ADB and USB.

🎯 What it does:
• Prepare ADB on Windows
• Install GitHub Termux build
• Handle Xiaomi/HyperOS restrictions
• Configure SSH with public key auth
• Connect via adb forward

💡 Key Features:
• No root required
• Automated validation workflow
• Bilingual docs (EN/JP)
• MIT licensed

Perfect for developers who want remote Termux access from Windows.

$ONIAGI
